\subsection*{Running Results Snapshot}
This fragment is generated directly from \texttt{gpt4\_family\_results.json}, \texttt{gpt5\_family\_results.json}, \texttt{anthropic\_family\_results.json} and \texttt{combined\_quantum\_fit.json}.

The current finished run contains 6912 usable evaluations. The overall mean normalized error is 0.408, with median 0.302, 90th percentile 1.000, and 95th percentile 1.000. Exact-correct outputs occur on 0.345 of samples, while 0.274 of samples are effectively full-error failures.
The best model by mean error is \texttt{claude-opus-4-1-20250805} (0.138), while the weakest is \texttt{gpt-4o-mini} (0.570). The best depth setting is 1 with mean error 0.403. The hardest category is \texttt{circuit\_evolution} (0.657), and the easiest is \texttt{entanglement\_classification} (0.196).
The fitted scaling law is $d_{phys} \approx k S^{-3.262} D^{0.092}$, with $\alpha=3.262 [2.959, 3.558]$ and $\beta=0.092 [-0.279, 0.460]$.
